note: Body classification key, aligned to the machineryofgovernment.uk category scheme (pattern only, no data reuse). Two tiers: departments and public bodies. 'regulator' (v0.1) dropped — regulation is a function captured via powers (Spiral 2), not a structural type; regulators keep their statutory form (usually non_ministerial_department or an NDPB). 'royal_charter_body' is retained but NOT populated from the GOV.UK Organisations API (chartered bodies sit outside it); it is filled by a separate Privy Council-sourced tranche, each cited to its charter. Officials (PM, ministers, civil servants) are NOT body types — they are the Office/PersonRole layer.
